creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
The TRUTH about Kaktus Towers and their award? 🫣👇  The so-called Kaktus Towers in Copenhagen have just won “Europe’s Best Tall Building”, awarded by an international jury of architects at a conference in London. That title has sparked much debate in the local community here in Copenhagen because most people think these buildings are an eyesore and don’t fit into the Copenhagen skyline 🥵

Now, I’ve been to London more than a fair few times, so I think I know what must have happened at the award ceremony:   With a long day ahead of them, the members of the jury decided to nip to the nearest pub for a quick one before having a look at all the nominated buildings. You know, just to wet the whistle 😉  But the vibes were great - maybe they went to one of those proper old-school boozers that reeks of history - and the architects just couldn’t leave the pub, so they had another one. And another one. And another one… 👀  So, by the time they went back to the conference to cast their votes, they were all absolutely steaming and just picked the first building on the list and handed them the award. That must have been what happened, right? 🫣

Or what do you think? Are the Kaktus Towers simply the ‘best tall building’ in Europe? 

#copenhagen #denmark🇩🇰 #copenhagenlife
